# Profit by Faith

> Faith-based live day trading community. NQ Mini Futures trading, live daily 9:45–10:45 AM ET, Monday–Friday.

## About

Profit by Faith is led by Mr. Bullionaire — a faith-driven NQ Futures day trader who streams live sessions daily on YouTube (@bullionaireDT). The mission is to build a transparent, honest trading community where wins AND losses are shared openly. No gimmicks, no pressure, no fake results.

## Pages

- [Home](https://profitbyfaith.com/): Hero, about, strategies, transparency dashboard, prop firms, YouTube embeds, community, training, email signup
- [Trade Journal](https://profitbyfaith.com/trades/): Daily trade calendar showing green/red sessions, per-day P&L, trade log, and session notes

## Trading Strategies

- **15-Minute Opening Range Breakout (15 ORB)**: Captures the first 15-minute range and trades the breakout long or short with defined risk
- **Volume Profile Trading**: Uses Point of Control (POC), Value Area High/Low, and Low/High Volume Nodes for high-probability entries

## Prop Firms

Active accounts on Apex, Bulenox, and Take Profit Trader — all traded live on air.

## Community

- YouTube: https://youtube.com/@bullionaireDT
- Live sessions: Monday–Friday, 9:45–10:45 AM ET
